# Purdue SMIF

> The Purdue Student Managed Investment Fund — a premier student-run investment fund at the Daniels School of Business, Purdue University. Members manage real capital across U.S. equities and fixed income, benchmarked against the S&P 500.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the fund, AUM, and pillars.
- [About](/about): History, philosophy, investment process, and IPS.
- [Team](/team): Executive board, sector teams, fixed income & macro, and portfolio managers.
- [Sectors](/sectors): Coverage teams across equities, fixed income & macro, and portfolio + risk management.
- [Holdings](/holdings): Current portfolio positions, allocations, and returns.
- [Performance](/performance): Annual and cumulative returns vs. the S&P 500.
- [Research](/research): Equity research reports, semester reports, and annual reports.
- [Learn](/learn): Curriculum, valuation resources, and analyst training materials.
- [Recruiting](/recruiting): Recruiting calendar plus technical and behavioral interview prep guide.
- [Apply](/apply): Application timeline and how to join.
- [Contact](/contact): Email, address, and LinkedIn.
